description: Perform a technical audit of the inbox to identify email client software used by senders by inspecting email headers such as User-Agent or X-Mailer. Identify at least three distinct email client families and create a folder for each, named with the prefix 'UA-' followed by the client name (e.g., 'UA-Mutt'). Move at least three emails from each identified client into their respective folders. Summarize your findings in a draft email to 'product-team@company.com' with the subject 'Client Demographics Report'.
